existing_features.title: Create a new 'Apply Now' / Job Application section component (ApplicationSection.tsx) that includes a form with fields for: Full Name, Email, Phone Number, Nationality, Position Applied For (dropdown or text), Years of Experience, and a Resume/CV upload field. The form should match the existing site's visual theme (colors, typography, card styling) and be accessible from the hero section's 'Apply' button.
Add the ApplicationSection to the site navigation in the Header component so users can navigate directly to the application form from the main menu.
